description: Fix all TypeScript errors in the codebase to make the build pass green. There are errors in 6 TSX files: apps/quantchat/src/components/StoryCreator.tsx, apps/quantchat/src/pages/bitmoji.tsx, apps/quantchat/src/pages/spotlight.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/components/FileManager.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/drive.tsx, apps/quantmail/src/pages/security.tsx. All errors are JSX syntax issues (numeric literals in template expressions, broken JSX tags).
steps: Read apps/quantchat/src/components/StoryCreator.tsx around lines 153-155 and fix the numeric literal issues (likely Tailwind classes like `w-[100px]` not properly escaped in JSX template literals)
Read apps/quantchat/src/pages/bitmoji.tsx around lines 130-175 and fix the broken JSX (missing closing tags, improper template syntax). This file has the most errors.
Read apps/quantchat/src/pages/spotlight.tsx around lines 128-134 and fix numeric literal issues
Read apps/quantmail/src/components/FileManager.tsx around lines 245 and 282 and fix numeric literal issues
Read apps/quantmail/src/pages/drive.tsx around line 282 and fix numeric literal issue
Read apps/quantmail/src/pages/security.tsx around line 374 and fix numeric literal issue
Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm zero errors
acceptance_criteria: Running `npx tsc --noEmit` produces zero TypeScript errors
No functional changes - only syntax fixes
verification: Run: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx tsc --noEmit (should produce no output)
Run: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx vitest run (all tests pass)
findings: Fixed 6 TSX files. Root causes: (1) Unicode escape sequences like \u{1F600} in JSX text content are parsed as literal \u followed by JSX expression {1F600} causing TS1351 numeric literal errors - fixed by wrapping in string expressions like {'\u{1F600}'}. (2) Generic type <T> in bitmoji.tsx interpreted as JSX element - fixed with trailing comma <T,>. Note: TS6305 errors about missing dist/ output files are pre-existing and unrelated to code quality - they occur because composite project references expect built output.
